name: launchdarkly
description: Read LaunchDarkly projects, feature flags, and environments, and toggle flags

envVars.name: LAUNCHDARKLY_API_TOKEN
envVars.description: LaunchDarkly personal or service access token (sent raw in the Authorization header, no prefix)

tools.name: List Projects
tools.description: List projects in the LaunchDarkly account

offset.description: Where to start in the list, for pagination

tools.name: List Feature Flags
tools.description: List feature flags in a project, optionally scoped to one environment

env.description: Environment key — restricts environment-specific flag configuration to this environment

query.description: Case-insensitive match on flag key or name

offset.description: Where to start in the list, for pagination

historicalSummary.omitted: variations, per-environment configuration, and link metadata

tools.name: Get Feature Flag
tools.description: Get a feature flag including its variations and per-environment configuration

featureFlagKey.description: Feature flag key (from List Feature Flags)

env.description: Environment key — limit returned configuration to this environment

tools.name: List Environments
tools.description: List environments in a LaunchDarkly project

offset.description: Where to start in the list, for pagination

tools.name: Toggle Feature Flag
tools.description: Turn a feature flag on or off in one environment using a semantic patch instruction

environmentKey.description: Environment key the instructions apply to

comment.description: Optional audit log comment for the change

prompts.title: Flag inventory
prompts.prompt: List the feature flags in my LaunchDarkly project and group them by whether they are archived or tagged as temporary.

prompts.title: Check a flag
prompts.prompt: Get my LaunchDarkly flag and tell me whether it is on in production and what the default variation is.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: LaunchDarkly API Setup

steps.title: Sign in to LaunchDarkly
steps.description: Use an existing account or start a trial at https://app.launchdarkly.com. A project with a couple of test flags is enough to exercise all tools.

steps.title: Create an access token
steps.description: Go to Organization settings → Authorization (https://app.launchdarkly.com/settings/authorization) and create a personal or service access token. A Reader role token is enough for the read tools; toggling flags needs Writer access to the relevant projects.

steps.title: Set the environment variable
steps.description: Add the token to your .env as LAUNCHDARKLY_API_TOKEN=...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run List Projects, then List Feature Flags with a project key.

notes: The Authorization header contains the raw token with no Bearer prefix
Toggle Feature Flag uses LaunchDarkly's semantic patch format: Content-Type 'application/json; domain-model=launchdarkly.semanticpatch' with an instructions array
EU and Federal instances use different hosts (app.eu.launchdarkly.com, app.launchdarkly.us); these tools target the commercial instance at app.launchdarkly.com
